body_txt: Want to have incredible jumping powers without having any superpowers in the first place? Why, look no further than wearing the good old spring coil. In fiction, the spring coil is a guaranteed way to reach high places, among other things such as a powerful attack or pushing back enemies. A Rubber Man may be able to reshape himself into a spring coil. Some animals with tails may be able to shape it as a spring coil. Sometimes part of Tricked-Out Shoes . Often accompanied by a notable Stock Sound Effects from string instruments. See also Springs, Springs Everywhere for when springs are part of the background, Spring Jump , and Hopping Machine .
